text: What protected characteristics and bias detection methodology are used to assess fairness?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify protected characteristics relevant to the use case domain and jurisdiction.

text: What bias testing methodology will be applied (demographic parity, equalized odds, individual fairness)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend fairness metrics based on use case type and regulatory context.

text: How will training data bias be identified and mitigated?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose data auditing and debiasing techniques based on data characteristics.

text: What bias detection tools and disparate impact analysis processes are in place?
aiAgentGuidance: Design bias monitoring pipeline with demographic slicing and drift detection.

text: How will disparate impact on different user groups be measured?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up disparate impact metrics and threshold monitoring.

text: What remediation process exists when bias is detected?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft bias remediation playbook with escalation and correction procedures.

text: Has a representative set of users been consulted about fairness concerns?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human-led stakeholder engagement and consultation.

text: How will intersectional bias (multiple protected characteristics) be addressed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design intersectional analysis methodology for compound disadvantage detection.

text: What level of explainability is required for AI decisions (technical, business, end-user)?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine explainability needs based on audience and decision impact.

text: How will AI decision-making logic be communicated to affected individuals?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose explanation formats appropriate for end-user technical literacy.

text: What explainability methods will be implemented (SHAP, LIME, attention visualization, natural language)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend explainability methods based on model type and audience needs.

text: What AI disclosure requirements and transparency reporting processes are established?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft disclosure language and UX placement recommendations.

text: What transparency report will be published about AI system performance?
aiAgentGuidance: Design transparency report template with key metrics and demographics.

text: How will model limitations and known weaknesses be documented and communicated?
aiAgentGuidance: Create model card template with limitation documentation.

text: Who is accountable for AI system decisions and their consequences?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human assignment of accountability roles.

text: What governance structure oversees this AI system's ethical implications?
aiAgentGuidance: Map to existing governance bodies and their mandates.

text: What appeals or contestation process exists for individuals affected by AI decisions?
aiAgentGuidance: Design appeal process based on decision impact and regulatory requirements.

text: How will ethical concerns raised by employees or users be escalated?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose ethical concern escalation pathway and whistleblower protection.

text: What periodic ethical review cadence applies to this system?
aiAgentGuidance: Set review frequency based on risk level and regulatory requirements.

text: How will accountability be maintained across the AI supply chain (data providers, model providers, deployers)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map accountability across supply chain participants and contracts.

text: How does this AI system impact human autonomy and decision-making authority?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human assessment of autonomy impacts.

text: What level of human oversight is appropriate (human-in-the-loop, on-the-loop, out-of-the-loop)?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on appropriate oversight level based on risk.

text: How will the system prevent over-reliance on AI recommendations?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose anti-automation-bias measures (confidence calibration, friction points).

text: What safeguards prevent the AI from making decisions that should require human judgment?
aiAgentGuidance: Define decision boundaries with mandatory human review triggers.

text: How will users maintain meaningful control over AI-assisted processes?
aiAgentGuidance: Design user control mechanisms (override, adjust, pause, stop).

text: What personal data is collected and processed by the AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory personal data flows through the AI pipeline.

text: Is informed consent obtained for AI processing of personal data?
aiAgentGuidance: Review consent mechanisms against data processing activities.

text: How is data minimization practiced (only collecting necessary data)?
aiAgentGuidance: Audit data collection against minimum necessary for the AI task.

text: What data anonymization or pseudonymization techniques are applied?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend anonymization techniques based on data types and re-identification risk.

text: How are data subject rights (access, deletion, portability) supported?
aiAgentGuidance: Map data subject rights processes for AI training and inference data.

text: What safeguards prevent re-identification of anonymized data?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess re-identification risk and recommend additional protections.

text: How is purpose limitation enforced for data used in AI training and inference?
aiAgentGuidance: Design purpose limitation controls and usage auditing.

text: What broader social impacts could this AI system create (positive and negative)?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human assessment of societal implications.

text: How might this AI system affect employment and labor markets?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze workforce impact and propose transition support measures.

text: What is the environmental impact of training and running this AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate carbon footprint from compute requirements and energy sources.

text: Does this AI system risk creating or reinforcing power imbalances?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human analysis of power dynamics and equity implications.

text: How will the system's social impact be monitored over time?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose social impact monitoring framework with periodic assessments.

text: What safety-critical scenarios must the AI system handle correctly?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify safety-critical scenarios from domain analysis and failure mode assessment.

text: What fail-safe mechanisms prevent harmful actions by the AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Design fail-safe architecture with multiple layers of protection.

text: How will the system handle adversarial attacks aimed at causing harm?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose adversarial robustness measures based on threat model.

text: What testing has been done for dangerous or harmful outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Design red team testing protocol for harmful output scenarios.

text: How will reliability be ensured in high-stakes decision contexts?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose reliability engineering practices for critical AI decisions.

text: Has the AI system been tested for accessibility across diverse user populations?
aiAgentGuidance: Design accessibility testing plan covering diverse user needs.

text: How does the system perform across different languages and cultural contexts?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate multilingual and multicultural performance gaps.

text: What accommodations exist for users with disabilities?
aiAgentGuidance: Map accessibility requirements to WCAG standards and assistive technology support.

text: How will digital literacy barriers be addressed for end users?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose UX simplification and training for low-literacy users.

text: Are there IP concerns with using AI-generated content?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze IP risks from training data provenance and generated content ownership.

text: How will the organization's IP be protected from leaking through AI interactions?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data loss prevention measures for AI interfaces.

text: What licensing implications exist for AI model usage?
aiAgentGuidance: Review model licensing terms and compliance requirements.

text: What ethical AI principles guide this implementation?
aiAgentGuidance: Map to organization's AI ethics policy and industry frameworks (IEEE, OECD, EU).

text: Has an Ethics Impact Assessment (EIA) been conducted?
aiAgentGuidance: Guide through EIA framework and flag areas needing deeper analysis.

text: How will ethical considerations evolve as the system learns and adapts?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human foresight on evolving ethical implications.

text: What mechanisms exist for ongoing ethical monitoring and review?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose ethical monitoring dashboard and review cadence.

text: How will conflicting ethical principles be resolved (e.g., accuracy vs. fairness)?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on ethical trade-off priorities.

text: What external ethical review or advisory input has been sought?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human-driven engagement with external ethics advisors.

text: How are users informed about AI involvement and given opt-out mechanisms?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft AI disclosure notices meeting regulatory requirements.

text: Can users opt out of AI-driven processes and receive human alternatives?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human decision on opt-out availability and human fallback.

text: What rights do users have to understand and challenge AI decisions?
aiAgentGuidance: Map user rights from regulatory requirements (GDPR Art. 22, EU AI Act).

text: How will feedback from affected individuals be collected and acted upon?
aiAgentGuidance: Design feedback collection and response workflow.

text: What data portability rights exist for user-generated AI interaction data?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess data portability requirements from applicable regulations.

text: How will user consent be managed for AI model training on their data?
aiAgentGuidance: Design consent management system for training data usage.
